taxonomy: Lastrea ascendens is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to parts of Asia, specifically in China and Southeast Asia. The classification of Lastrea ascendens places it within the genus Lastrea, which is a group of ferns commonly known as the "elkhorn ferns". The family Dryopteridaceae includes a wide range of ferns, many of which are found in tropical and subtropical regions. The specific classification of Lastrea ascendens is subject to ongoing research and revision in the field of botany.
